title: F5: drop fab_extract_knowledge.source_session singular field (use source_sessions plural only)
scope: api-contracts schema + extract-knowledge handler + all callers
description: fab_extract_knowledge currently accepts BOTH source_session (singular legacy) and source_sessions (plural canonical). The dual-field design creates a superRefine branch that has zero remaining users — the archive skill and import skill both use the plural form. Remove source_session entirely (schema, superRefine, handler, frontmatter writer, all callers + tests).

files.change: Delete source_session field; drop the superRefine block that reconciled singular vs plural; collapse to just source_sessions array
Delete the legacy-merge logic; consume source_sessions directly
Search-and-replace any source_session: occurrences with source_sessions: [...]

implementation: Grep `source_session\b` across the repo to enumerate all caller sites
Patch api-contracts.ts schema (remove field + superRefine arm)
Patch each caller emission point (skills templates, CLI commands, tests)
Update __tests__ for extract-knowledge to drop singular-form fixtures
Run full test suite via `pnpm -r test` to catch any missed callers

reference.pattern: Prior dual-field deprecation (e.g. how rc.21 dropped legacy fields)
reference.examples: Mirror rc.21 cite-policy field cleanup pattern

criteria: grep `source_session\b` returns zero non-test, non-history matches
extract-knowledge schema accepts ONLY source_sessions (zod parse rejects singular form)
All extract-knowledge unit + integration tests pass

rationale.chosen_approach: Hard removal across schema + handler + all callers in one PR — pre-user clean-slate
alternatives_considered: Deprecate-then-remove over two rcs (rejected: no real users; deprecation overhead unjustified)
rationale.tradeoffs: Any in-flight skill scripts using singular form must be regenerated — acceptable scope

manual_checks: Run fabric-archive skill end-to-end and confirm source_sessions path works
